content.description:
Wrapper that captures the global `window.CodeMirror` object (loaded by [codemirror](item://ad3bddac-95ce-41ae-aa11-6f6e6f537bc6)) and exports it as an ES module. Deletes the global reference to prevent pollution.

## Usage

```javascript
const CodeMirror = await api.require('codemirror-wrapper');
const editor = CodeMirror(element, { mode: 'javascript' });
```

## Dependencies

Requires [codemirror](item://ad3bddac-95ce-41ae-aa11-6f6e6f537bc6) to be loaded first (sets `window.CodeMirror`).
